name: Napa Spring Roll with Shiitake Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the peanut oil in a skillet over moderate heat.
2. Add onions and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Stir in garlic and ginger, cooking for an additional minute.
4. Add wine and simmer until the liquid reduces by one-third.
5. Incorporate cabbage and mushrooms; cook until cabbage wilts.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Remove from heat and let cool completely.
8. Refrigerate for up to 72 hours if desired.
9. Place the cabbage mixture in the center of an egg roll skin.
10. Brush the edges with egg white.
11. Fold the sides over the filling, then roll tightly into a log shape.
12. Heat oil in a deep fryer or skillet to 350°F (175°C).
13. Fry the rolls until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
14. Remove and drain on a wire rack; blot with paper towels.
15. Slice thinly and serve with hot mustard on the side.
